THECURSEDMOD-THE_CURSED_MOD.title: The Cursed
THECURSEDMOD-THE_CURSED_MOD.description:
A wanderer corrupted by darkness.
Uses [gold]Curses[/gold], [gold]Circles[/gold], and sometimes forbidden weapons that bring [gold]Karma[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-THE_CURSED_MOD.eventDeathPr: The curse won't let me die just yet.
THECURSEDMOD-THE_CURSED_MOD.aromaPrincip: [sine][purple]How people treat you is their karma, how you react is yours.[/purple][/sine]
THECURSEDMOD-THE_CURSED_MOD.cardsModifie: Cursed cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
